title: What I Got by Project Inner Thought
lyrics: Can you believe? The teachings growing in my blood Rays of doubt from my eyes While I'm insane Too much was bought in this past year Wish I wouldn't have paid the cost Set a roadblock, lead it to a vacant lot My mind's in this world, don't tear it up But this shit is what I got It's what I got, it's what I got, yeah It's what I got Can't stop thinking about it I never was about it But now my mind's clouded And doubted, it's crowded I need a way out, need to figure out What life's about, need to reroute my ways Get the hell out, I need to find my way back home Black and nomad on the land, it's free to roam Come and go, my mind snaps back, I'm in the zone Here to let you know that it's gonna be known Can you believe? The teachings growing in my blood Rays of doubt from my eyes While I'm insane Too much was bought in this past year I wish I wouldn't have paid the cost Set a roadblock, lead it to a vacant lot My mind's in this world, don't tear it up But this shit is what I got It's what I got, it's what I got, yeah It's what I got Let heart beat down your spine Vibration on the thoughts of your sexual crimes But if you want those thoughts on, on your mind Take you by the neck, gang Put your face down from behind Listen up and feel this energy A shockwave of thought, cheek it, are you hearing me? This path is damned, please flee A blind world without the thoughts of you and me This intuition provokes fears and dreams That I broke from this lifetime of doing drugs Till I choked, lost my girl, world, life, and the will to be loved Though I'm not here to despise or spit your lies Try to go clean and make, make your life fly Every time that you want me Just another second to just scream some Baby girl, just breathe, yeah, huh You just breathe, can you believe? The tension growing in my blood Face I'm down from a high cloud, I'm insane Too much was bought in this past year Wish I would've paid the cost Set a roadblock, lead it to a vacant lot My mind's just fucked up, tear it up But this shit is what I got It's what I got, it's what I got, yeah It's what I got It's what I got, it's what I got, yeah Time to take a step back from the brain Take the truth, don't see, float on my waves Of advice I write, act to entice, make your life nice Time to feel what we're saying, teach and push and run, test brain Words of wisdom to make it change Place a new life to rearrange Feel the sun, make it last Recall times so fast, fucked up past Now all gone, set a rewind, it's just What I got, it's a lot What you got, it's squat When I drop, I make it hot Project in a dot, got the game locked Got you in the scope at twelve o'clock Pull it back, watch it drop, like you faded on a crop Eyes squinted, minds demented, windows tinted Feel what I feel from beginning to the ending I'm winning every time, cost to finish on these raps It's mine, it's Jax, it's mine, it's fine Catch you on an incline Can you believe The tension growing in my blood Rays of doubt from a hot flower I'm insane Too much was bought in this past year Wish I would have paid the cost Set a roadblock, lead it to a vacant lot My mind is fucked up till I Fuck this shit It's what I got, it's what I got, it's what I got Motherfucker, it's what I got Can you believe The tension growing in my blood Rays of doubt from a hot flower I'm insane Too much was bought in this past year Wish I would have paid the cost Set a roadblock, lead it to a vacant lot My mind is fucked up till I Fuck this shit It's what I got, it's what I got, it's what I got Motherfucker, it's what I got Thanks for watching!
